DigitalOpus.MB.Core.SerializableSourceBlendShape2Combined Class Reference

It is possible to combine multiple skinned meshes each of which may have blend shapes. This builds a map for mapping source blend shapes to combined blend shapes. The map can be serialized and saved in a prefab, this makes it possible to save combined meshes with Blend Shapes in a prefab. More...

int[] blendShapeIdx
 

Detailed Description

It is possible to combine multiple skinned meshes each of which may have blend shapes. This builds a map for mapping source blend shapes to combined blend shapes. The map can be serialized and saved in a prefab, this makes it possible to save combined meshes with Blend Shapes in a prefab.
